lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Hey guy! Always nice to see a fresh face!

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: That's right, guy! Ain't nobody better at fishing round here than me! That's for sure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fish here instead of you?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Sorry guy! This is my lucky spot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: Why would I help you? I wanna stay the best! I'm not givin' away my secrets like old Grampa Jack does!

lines.speaker: Big Dave
lines.text: You really have no clue do you! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
